title: sida hookeri
intro: Sida hookeri, also known as Hooker's fanpetals, is a species of flowering plant in the mallow family, Malvaceae. It is traditionally used in Ayurvedic medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial effects. The plant is believed to provide several health benefits, including reducing fever, alleviating respiratory issues, and supporting the immune system. In herbal preparations, Sida hookeri is often used in the form of decoctions, infusions, or powders, and is also used to make traditional remedies such as teas and tonics.
